# Copilot instructions: urchin-rust

Urchin memory substrate. Rust workspace with multiple crates (urchin-core, urchin-intake, urchin-mcp).

Key conventions:
- Workspace structure: crates/ subdirectory per crate
- Run tests: cargo test
- MCP server exposed via urchin-mcp crate

For full workspace context and session state, read ~/AGENTS.md and ~/.claude/checkpoints/latest.md.
